|goldefficiency = 
* {{iis|Yun Tal Wildarrows}} gold efficiency is further increased by an additional {{gec|Yun Tal Wildarrows|+{{#var:crit}}*0.2}} for every {{sbc|Practice Makes Lethal}} stack up to {{gec|Yun Tal Wildarrows|{{#var:stacked}}}} fully stacked.
* {{ii|Yun Tal Wildarrows}} becomes {{gec|Yun Tal Wildarrows|{{#expr:{{#var:total}}+{{#var:as}}*30}}}} - {{gec|Yun Tal Wildarrows|{{#expr:{{#var:total}}+{{#var:crit}}*25+{{#var:as}}*30}}}} gold efficient while {{sbc|Flurry}} is active.

|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V26.01]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|3100}} from {{g|3000}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|850}} from {{g|750}}.
* Attack damage reduced to 50 from 55.
* Attack speed increased to 40% from 35%.

;[[V25.09]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Practice Makes Lethal no longer fails to gain stacks from certain empowered attacks of champion abilities that would otherwise be able to trigger on-attack effects.

;[[V25.06]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Now correctly counts as innately having critical strike chance for the purposes of {{ri|Jack of All Trades}}.

;[[V25.05]]
* Bonus critical strike chance gained from Practice Makes Lethal is now considered an innate stat.
* Practice Makes Lethal critical strike chance per stack changed to {{rd|{{fd|0.4}}%|{{fd|0.2}}%}} from {{fd|0.2}}% for all users.
* Maximum stacks changed to {{rd|63|125}} from 125 for all users.
** Maximum critical strike chance unchanged at 25%.

;[[V25.S1.2]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|3000}} from {{g|2900}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|750}} from {{g|650}}.
* Attack damage increased to 55 from 50.
* Attack speed increased to 35% from 25%.

;[[V14.23]]
* Total cost reduced to {{g|2900}} from {{g|3000}}.
** Combine cost reduced to {{g|650}} from {{g|750}}.
* Flurry duration increased to 6 seconds from 4.
* Flurry cooldown reduced to 30 seconds from 40.

;[[V14.22]]
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Scout's Slingshot}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|750}} = {{g|3000}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 50 attack damage, 25% attack speed.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Practice Makes Lethal:}} Basic attacks on-attack grant {{as|{{fd|0.2}}% critical strike chance}}, stacking up to 125 times for a total of {{as|25% critical strike chance}}.
*** Practice Makes Lethal critical strike chance per stack increased to {{fd|0.5}}% on ARAM.
*** Practice Makes Lethal maximum stacks reduced to 50 on ARAM.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Flurry:}} Attacking an enemy champion grants you {{as|30% '''bonus''' attack speed}} for 4 seconds (40 second cooldown, reduced by 1 second on-hit, or 2 seconds if it {{tip|critically strike|critically strikes}}).
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{ii|Noonquiver}} + {{g|775}} = {{g|2950}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 60 attack damage, 25% critical strike chance.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Serrated Edge:}} {{tip|Basic damage}} that {{tip|critically strike|critically strikes}} [[on-hit]] inflicts a bleed on the target, causing them to take {{ft|{{as|15 '''bonus''' physical damage}} every 0.5 seconds over 2 seconds.|{{as|60 '''bonus''' physical damage}} over 2 seconds.}} Subsequent applications of the bleed can stack, but do not refresh the duration of the previous bleed.

;[[V14.20]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{ii|Noonquiver}} + {{g|775}} = {{g|2950}}. 
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Noonquiver}} + {{g|600}} = {{g|3200}}.
* Attack damage reduced to 60 from 65.
* Serrated Edge damage per tick reduced to 15 from {{fd|17.5}}.
** Serrated Edge total damage reduced to 60 from 70.

;[[V14.19]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|B. F. Sword}} + {{ii|Noonquiver}} + {{g|600}} = {{g|3200}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{ii|Noonquiver}} + {{g|925}} = {{g|3200}}.
* Serrated Edge damage changed to 70 from {{as|35% AD}}.

;[[V14.11]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Damage tracker now correctly tracks only post-mitigation damage dealt to champions. Previously, it would count damage to non-champion units, as well as pre-mitigation damage dealt to all units including champions.

;[[V14.10]] - Added
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{ii|Noonquiver}} + {{g|925}} = {{g|3200}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 65 attack damage, 25% critical strike chance.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Serrated Edge:}} {{tip|Basic damage}} that {{tip|critical strike|critically strikes}} [[on-hit]] inflicts a bleed on the target, causing them to take{{ft|{{as|{{ap|35/4}}% AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} every {{fd|0.5}} seconds over 2 seconds.|{{as|35% AD}} {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} over 2 seconds.}}Subsequent applications of the bleed can stack, but do not refresh the duration of the previous bleed.
* {{sbc|Caption:}} "Passed from Huntress to Huntress, to fell foe after foe."
* Limited to 1 '''Yun Tal Wildarrows'''.
* Has the following keywords: "yuntal", "arrow".
}}
